# Founders University

> A monthly membership that gives ambitious beginners the structure, live guidance, and community to build an online business — built by operators, not gurus.

## What it is
Founders University is a paid online membership from the team behind Easy Scale Media. Members get new monthly modules, weekly live Q&A calls, a private community, and ongoing guidance focused on building online income, discipline, and direction. It is an environment and a system for taking action — not just another folder of videos.

## Who it is for
Ambitious beginners who feel stuck or unsure where to start online and want structure, accountability, and an environment that makes building feel inevitable. It is not for people who want results without consistent effort.

## Offer
- Price: EUR 49.95 per month. No contract, cancel anytime.
- Includes: monthly growth modules, weekly live Q&A calls, a private like-minded community, and guidance/discipline/structure.
- Join / checkout: https://whop.com/checkout/plan_cj8jSLue9jjfn

## Founder
Kim Chiaretti, co-founder, alongside her brothers Bob and Luca — the team behind Easy Scale Media, which has worked with 500+ e-commerce brands over 5+ years.
